# aigateway_model (Data Source)

Look up an existing gateway model by its model_id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aigateway_model" "gpt_5_4" {
  model_id = "gpt-5.4"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model_id` (String) The model id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `capability` (String)
- `deployment_name` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) Server-assigned internal id.
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `model_type` (String)
- `provider_id` (String)
- `provider_model_id` (String)
